hero.title: The AI Design Lab
hero.subtitle: Where Machines Dream in Pixels
hero.description: Experiment with state-of-the-art AI tools. We provide the engine, you provide the vision. Transform concepts into reality instantly.

tools.title: Virtual Try-On
tools.description: Upload a photo of yourself and any garment to see an instant, realistic preview of how it looks on you.

tools.title: Style Reference Transfer
tools.description: Extract the aesthetic, lighting, and texture from one image and apply it to your designs automatically.

tools.title: Smart Background Remover
tools.description: High-precision AI edge detection to remove backgrounds from even the most complex subjects like hair or fur.

tools.title: Prompt-to-Pattern
tools.description: Generate seamless textile patterns and textures using simple natural language descriptions.
